creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text: I was curious what the standards compliant thing to do here was and it's apparently to be completely unhelpful and not say what the mode bit mean except in some other badly referenced document (having checked Solaris, Linux, and POSIX).  We have some internal defines which are documented in semget.2.  I wonder if we'd be better off switching to the SHM_[RW] version of that text (and adding it to msgget).  That would avoid the need for more headers.
